title: SentraSuite - SentraScan
description: SentraScan statically assesses MCP, model, and RAG surfaces for tool poisoning, unsafe permissions, command-injection patterns, deserialization risks, and configuration drift, then enforces policy gates and evidence capture before agentic systems move toward production.

items: Perform SAST/DAST on agent planning code, tool wrappers, & plugin interfaces.
